creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to George Mitchell from comment #328)

At the ddb> prompt you can type the command: dump
to save the dump to swap if it is possible this
early.

At the ddb> prompt you can type the command: dump
to save the dump to swap if it is possible this
early.

It appears that you will need an alternate kernel in place
to boot from by selecting it from the loader.

Have you or are you supplying the kernel and kernel.debug
for this build? I'll likely need them even if I do not get
vmcore.* file.
